results.evidence: label-cache.ts: module-level Map<string, Set<string>> keyed by repo slug. ensureLabels() checks Set before calling gh label create. Used by duplicate-detector.ts and github-feature-sync.ts. Tests in label-cache.test.ts verify dedup on second call.

milestone-cache.ts: MilestoneCache class with Map<string, CachedMilestone> keyed by owner/repo:title. getOrCreate() returns cached on hit. github-feature-sync.ts:901 calls MilestoneCache.getOrCreate(). Tests in milestone-cache.test.ts verify no API call on second lookup.
Label cache keys are full repo slug strings. Milestone cache keys are owner/repo:title. Both test files include explicit cross-repo isolation tests verifying no cache leakage.

duplicate-detector.ts:485: guard checks process.env.SPECWEAVE_VERIFY_DUPLICATES === '1'. Default behavior skips Phase 3. duplicate-detector-phase3.test.ts verifies: default=skip, env=1=runs, wasReused=skip regardless of env.

github-client-v2.ts:668-715: getIssueWithLastComment() uses gh api graphql with combined query for issue fields + comments(last:1). Falls back to sequential REST on GraphQL failure. github-client-v2-graphql.test.ts verifies single-call, null-comment, and fallback paths.

github-client-v2.ts:342: options parameter with skipDuplicateCheck boolean. Line 350: if (!options?.skipDuplicateCheck) guards searchIssueByTitle call. create-epic-skip-dedup.test.ts verifies skip=true skips search, default and false both search.

sync-progress.ts:278-296: spec.md parsed once, cachedAllUSIds populated via parseAllUserStoryIds(). Line 358 reuses cachedAllUSIds. github-feature-sync.ts:1040: updateUserStoryIssue uses getIssueWithLastComment() and passes cached data to updateStatusLabels and postProgressCommentIfChanged.
